title: athanasia minuta subsp. minuta
intro: Athanasia minuta subsp. minuta, also known as Chrysanthemum segetum, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family. It is a medicinal herb that has been used for centuries to treat various health conditions, with properties that include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Athanasia minuta subsp. minuta include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Athanasia minuta subsp. minuta can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
